hero.headline: Business Analyst who bridges requirements and delivery
hero.description: 5+ years translating business requirements into technical solutions across 20 enterprise implementations. Expert in SDLC, stakeholder workshops, and cross-functional collaboration. Deep experience with eCommerce operations at Amazon and SaaS delivery at scale.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Gathered and analyzed complex business requirements from 20+ enterprise clients through structured workshops with executives and operational teams — translating needs into comprehensive BRDs and solution designs.
Collaborated closely with development teams to configure SaaS solutions, ensuring technical delivery aligned with documented functional requirements and business objectives.
Designed and executed UAT frameworks, coordinating testing phases and issue resolution across multiple stakeholder groups for seamless go-live delivery.
Built standardized requirement gathering frameworks and effort estimation models — enabling accurate project scoping and reducing BRD ambiguity by systematizing the analysis process.

highlights.label: Process Innovation
highlights.text: Engineered a use-case-driven requirements analysis framework with complexity scoring — enabling pre-sales to scope accurately, auto-calculate timelines, and eliminate BRD/UAT ambiguity across enterprise implementations.

highlights.label: Cross-functional Leadership
highlights.text: Acted as primary liaison between clients and internal teams (product, engineering, design) — driving requirements clarification and solution refinement throughout the SDLC.

highlights.label: Global Requirements Gathering
highlights.text: Conducted on-site requirement analysis in Saudi Arabia and UK for high-value engagements — facilitating executive workshops and technical discovery across diverse business contexts.

highlights.label: Solution Validation
highlights.text: Led 4 of 5 pilot-to-enterprise conversions through structured requirement validation and early value demonstration — driving $350K+ in expansion value through thorough business analysis.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Analyzed operational requirements and designed process improvements for Amazon Fresh, Amazon Pantry, and Prime Now — directly supporting eCommerce catalog and supply chain operations.
Developed analytical frameworks using SQL queries and data analysis to prioritize operational defects — creating a systematic approach that delivered $230K monthly savings.
Collaborated with development and testing teams to identify SOP gaps and process inefficiencies — reducing invalid case assignments by ~50 per day through targeted analysis and documentation.

customSections.title: Relevant Domain Experience
items: 5+ years in eCommerce operations at Amazon — deep understanding of catalog management, supply chain processes, and retail operational workflows
3+ years implementing enterprise software solutions with complex business requirements across multiple industries
Experience with global business contexts — requirement gathering and solution delivery across UK, US, and Middle East markets
Strong background in operational process analysis and improvement — proven track record of identifying gaps and driving efficiency
